TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Takaray a sowal == Eca ka hakowa ko sowal no 'Amis to cengel. Hatiniay ko ka'adihay no cengel a ngangan: Kohecal: 白色. Tomili': 白晳,潔白. Masa'afoay a cengel:灰色. Koheting: 黑色. To'em:暗色,陰暗. Kahengang:紅色. Manowad/Minowad:粉紅色. Koleto:橙色.(Masamami'ay a cengel:橘子一樣的顏色.) Kaliyalaw/((Kaliyawliyaw):黃色. Korah:褐色. Lo'tim:棕色. Kangdaw:綠色. Langdaw:藍色. Lolo:紫色. Tarangitang:粉紅色.
S.PHON: == takaraj a so~uwaɾ == əʦa ka ħako~uwa ko~u so~uwaɾ no~u ʡamis to~u ʦəŋəɾ. ħatiniaj ko~u kaʡaɬ~ɮiħaj no~u ʦəŋəɾ a ŋaŋan: ko~uħəʦaɾ: **. to~umiɾiʡ: **,**. masaʡafo~uaj a ʦəŋəɾ:**. ko~uħətiŋ: **. to~uʡəm:**,**. kaħəŋaŋ:**. mano~uwaɬ~ɮ/mino~uwaɬ~ɮ:***. ko~uɾəto~u:**.(masamamiʡaj a ʦəŋəɾ:*******.) kaɾijaɾaw/((kaɾijawɾijaw):**. ko~uraħ:**. ɾo~uʡtim:**. kaŋɬ~ɮaw:**. ɾaŋɬ~ɮaw:**. ɾo~uɾo~u:**. taraŋitaŋ:***.
S.FORM: == Takaray a sowal == Eca ka hakowa ko sowal no 'Amis to cengel. Hatiniay ko ka'adihay no cengel a ngangan: Kohecal: 白色. Tomili': 白晳,潔白. Masa'afoay a cengel:灰色. Koheting: 黑色. To'em:暗色,陰暗. Kahengang:紅色. Manowad/Minowad:粉紅色. Koleto:橙色.(Masamami'ay a cengel:橘子一樣的顏色.) Kaliyalaw/((Kaliyawliyaw):黃色. Korah:褐色. Lo'tim:棕色. Kangdaw:綠色. Langdaw:藍色. Lolo:紫色. Tarangitang:粉紅色.
S.PHON: == takaraj a so~uwaɾ == əʦa ka ħako~uwa ko~u so~uwaɾ no~u ʡamis to~u ʦəŋəɾ. ħatiniaj ko~u kaʡaɬ~ɮiħaj no~u ʦəŋəɾ a ŋaŋan: ko~uħəʦaɾ: **. to~umiɾiʡ: **,**. masaʡafo~uaj a ʦəŋəɾ:**. ko~uħətiŋ: **. to~uʡəm:**,**. kaħəŋaŋ:**. mano~uwaɬ~ɮ/mino~uwaɬ~ɮ:***. ko~uɾəto~u:**.(masamamiʡaj a ʦəŋəɾ:*******.) kaɾijaɾaw/((kaɾijawɾijaw):**. ko~uraħ:**. ɾo~uʡtim:**. kaŋɬ~ɮaw:**. ɾaŋɬ~ɮaw:**. ɾo~uɾo~u:**. taraŋitaŋ:***.
